description: Weekly Sunday @ 03:00 UTC — Maintenance tier. Polls 1 active stream (MDE_DataExportSettings_CL — streaming-API export configuration; rare-change). The deprecated MDE_StreamingApiConfig_CL is also nominally part of this tier but is excluded from the actual poll (returns 404 on modern tenants — superseded by DataExportSettings). Weekly cadence is sufficient because data-export configuration only changes during architectural reviews; faster polling consumes 429 budget without operator value.
